title: Windows Privileged Group Membership Changed
description: Detects additions to privileged local, global, or universal groups through Security Event IDs 4728, 4732, and 4756.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' in ('4728', '4732', '4756') and ('Target User Name' like '*Domain Admins*' or 'Target User Name' like '*Enterprise Admins*' or 'Target User Name' like '*Administrators*' or 'Target User Name' like '*Remote Desktop Users*' or msg like '*Domain Admins*' or msg like '*Administrators*') | stats count as GroupChanges, unique('Target User Name') as Groups by User, 'Host Name (Server)', Entity | sort -GroupChanges

references.name: Microsoft Learn: 4728(S) A member was added to a security-enabled global group
Microsoft Learn: 4732(S) A member was added to a security-enabled local group
